obs: Seeking new gin-based cocktails. Planning Saffron Gin Fizz: 2oz gin, 1oz saffron syrup, 1oz lemon, 0.5oz honey syrup, egg white, orange bitters.
Exploring bitters: Yuzu, Cardamom, Cherry Blossom, Smoked Hickory, Celery, Grapefruit-Scallion suggested for gin pairing.
Cardamom Old Fashioned: 2oz gin-based whiskey, 0.5oz orange liqueur, 0.5oz honey syrup, 2 dashes cardamom bitters.
Making home flavored syrups. Hot infusion 10-30min for delicate flavors; cold for robust; 1:1 ratio; refrigerate 2-4 weeks.
Interested in Iceland natural wonders: Blue Lagoon, Golden Circle, Vatnajokull Glacier (8% of Iceland), Jokulsarlon, Seljalandsfoss/Skogafoss (60m), black sand beaches.
Summer (Jun-Aug): mild, long daylight. Winter (Dec-Feb): Northern Lights. May-Sept: hiking, fewer crowds, lower prices.
Considering car rental or tours. Plan itinerary in advance, avoid overbooking, leave spontaneity time, respect ecosystems.
Values artist collaborations for growth but worries about losing individual identity. Prefers artistic vision balanced with collaboration.
Learned: Bowie-Eno (Low, Heroes, Lodger), Traveling Wilburys (Dylan, Harrison, Lynne, Orbison, Petty), Björk-Arca, xx-Jamie xx, Kanye-producers.
Understands collaboration risks: creative clashing, artistic dilution. Cited Lou Reed-Metallica Lulu (2011) as widely-panned cautionary example.
Stays up Friday until ~12:30 AM watching TV/scrolling. Choosing Ozark: 33 episodes across 3 seasons (S1-10, S2-10, S3-11); S4 coming 2022.
Learning Spanish via La Casa de Papel Spanish audio + English subtitles. 41 episodes: S1-13, S2-9, S3-8, S4-8; S5 Vol1&2 (Sept/Dec 2021).
Reading Spanish books for practice. Assistant recommended: La Sombra del Viento (Zafón), La Casa de Espíritus (Allende), Cien años soledad (García Márquez), El Aleph (Borges).
Candidate hobbies: cycling (2yrs, from marathon injury), music bingo, vinyl collecting. Most joy from friends (pool, card games).
Admires Sir Bobby Charlton & Munich Disaster survivors. Manchester United fan; values Charlton's resilience rebuilding to 1968 European Cup.
External support need: 70/100. Relies on friends/mentors for enjoyment; may struggle with self-reliance per evaluator.
Interested in unconventional bases: coconut milk, tomato paste, miso, nut butter, apple cider vinegar, yogurt, wine, beer, vegetable stock.
New to nut butter soups. African Peanut Soup: 0.5c peanut butter, sweet potato, kale, cumin, coriander, cinnamon, tomatoes, 4c broth.
Seeking hearty winter soups. Interested in Thai Curry Chicken (coconut milk, red curry) and Quinoa-Black Bean soups.
Read 'The Silent Patient' by Alex Michaelides, finished Jan 25th in 5 days. Previously 'The Nightingale' by Kristin Hannah took ~3 weeks.
Audiobook listener during morning jogs. On Chapter 10 of 'Sapiens' by Yuval Noah Harari. Open to psychological thriller audiobooks.
'The Poison Tree' by Erin Kelly selected. Rex released from prison for sister Alice murder; Karen uncovers dark family secrets at Ravenswood.
